title: doc: full_reload_chats missing 'when to call' vs load_chats
description: full_reload_chats (client_task.rs:725) has no doc comment explaining *when* to call it vs load_chats directly. A contributor adding a new path that calls load_chats directly skips the error-to-UI reporting wrapper and silently drops failures. The function exists solely as a shared error-reporting shim over load_chats; that contract should be stated in its doc comment.
